weak_aliases.reason: Source label 'HDR' is a recognized acronym for the full legal name, supporting search but not merge authority beyond identity fields.

suggestion.rationale: Both records denote the same company (Henningson, Durham & Richardson Architecture and Engineering, P.C.). Strong identity fields agree: entity_type is company (explicit in first, implied in second) and the acronym HDR is shared. The name difference (full legal name vs. abbreviation 'HDR') is explained entirely by source-local naming conventions (acronym usage). No contradictions exist. Decision test 2 (same-object test) applies: all strong identity fields agree and name variations are abbreviation-only. Therefore these are duplicates and should merge into a single canonical record.
